blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,052 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 39" over the past week. Current depth: 70".
